workItem.title: Enforce single Goal approval, shared budgets and autonomous authorized subtasks

## Context

Symphony execution unit of the cross-repository Goal acancelas/bos-front#22.

## Expected outcome

Symphony executes included and derived repair work under one Goal approval, one execution window and aggregate time/token ceilings.

## Scope

- Consume Goal execution proposals and approvals
- Enforce inherited authorization, shared budgets and execution windows
- Freeze scope at 75 percent and stop new turns at 100 percent
- Use adaptive reviewers and no more than two repair cycles

## Out of scope

- Per-Issue approvals
- Direct GitHub access
- Unapproved scope expansion

## Acceptance criteria

- All included subtasks run without new approval
- Derived repairs inherit authorization
- New scope and higher ceilings pause for one Goal decision
- Pause and resume preserve remaining authorization
